gates.name: two clean package and derivative builds

failure_closures.issue: phase CLI direct execution initially lacked repository-root import setup
failure_closures.closure: phase scripts now insert the exact repository root before importing the canonical writer

failure_closures.issue: AIC IIIF info.json returned HTTP 403 and was initially treated as source unavailable
failure_closures.closure: preserved exact service identity and transport evidence, then selected external link-only without downloading image bytes

failure_closures.issue: a bounded AIC bulk object refresh ended with TLS EOF
failure_closures.closure: reused same-phase sealed object responses with identity and rights bindings; transport failure was not converted into source absence

failure_closures.issue: creator representation differences produced 43 false-positive drift records
failure_closures.closure: normalized the old CSV creator form against the current structured creator description, leaving 4 substantive changes and 61 unchanged

failure_closures.issue: runtime timing fields made an early package benchmark nondeterministic
failure_closures.closure: moved runtime performance evidence outside package content identity; clean package and derivative builds now match byte-for-byte

failure_closures.issue: the predecessor candidate validator accepted only formal_candidate_ready after the registry legally advanced
failure_closures.closure: accepted only the ordered formal_candidate_ready and media_bundle_ready states while preserving predecessor package phase flags

failure_closures.issue: post-CI evidence review found raw 43/22 drift metrics in download-manifest beside canonical 4/61 drift
failure_closures.closure: normalized package metrics at the canonical writer, added a cross-manifest validator assertion, rebuilt only two manifests and the registry, and reran targeted plus phase-scoped CI
